# 폰트 페어링 카탈로그

> 57개 폰트 조합. Display(제목) + Body(본문).
> CSV 검색 엔진이 없는 환경(Codex, Antigravity)에서 참조하는 마크다운 폴백.
> 검색 엔진 사용 가능 시: `python3 .github/skills/ui-designer-ui-design-guide/scripts/search.py "query" --domain font`

---

## 카테고리별 빠른 찾기

| 느낌 | 페어링 이름 | Display 폰트 | Body 폰트 |
|------|-----------|-------------|----------|
| clean\|modern\|geometric | Modern Geometric | Plus Jakarta Sans | Inter |
| clean\|neutral\|professional | Clean Sans | DM Sans | Inter |
| techy\|geometric\|sharp | Tech Geometric | Space Grotesk | IBM Plex Sans |
| friendly\|round\|approachable | Friendly Round | Nunito | Nunito Sans |
| elegant\|modern\|refined | Elegant Sans | Outfit | DM Sans |
| sharp\|clean\|structured | Sharp Clean | Manrope | Nunito Sans |

| luxury\|classic\|refined | Luxury Classic | Cormorant Garamond | Lato |
| magazine\|editorial\|stylish | Magazine Editorial | DM Serif Display | DM Sans |
| literary\|elegant\|readable | Literary Elegant | Lora | Merriweather Sans |
| modern\|contrast\|expressive | Modern Contrast | Fraunces | Inter |

| classic\|modern\|timeless | Classic Modern | EB Garamond | Source Sans 3 |
| refined\|authoritative\|international | Refined Authority | Noto Serif | Noto Sans |

| vintage\|modern\|warm | Vintage Modern | Spectral | Karla |

| crypto\|tech\|data | Crypto Tech | Roboto Mono | Roboto |

---

## Sans + Sans (20개)

### Modern Geometric
- **Display**: Plus Jakarta Sans (700)
- **Body**: Inter (400)
- **Mood**: clean|modern|geometric
- **적합 스타일**: minimal-dashboard|saas-landing|portfolio
- **CDN**: `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@700&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap`
- **Fallback**: system-ui, sans-serif

### Clean Sans
- **Display**: DM Sans (600)
- **Body**: Inter (400)
- **Mood**: clean|neutral|professional
- **적합 스타일**: admin-panel|dashboard|docs
- **CDN**: `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@600&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap`
- **Fallback**: system-ui, sans-serif

### Tech Geometric
- **Display**: Space Grotesk (600)
- **Body**: IBM Plex Sans (400)
- **Mood**: techy|geometric|sharp
- **적합 스타일**: dev-tools|api-docs|saas
- **CDN**: `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@600&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400&display=swap`
- **Fallback**: system-ui, sans-serif

- **Body**: Nunito Sans (400)
